channel.title: John Ruiz

item.title: First Post: The New Website
item.description: My website used to be static html that I created with a little bit of bootstrap help. I love bootstrap - not least because its creator (mdo) is a fellow Hubber - but the truth is that I don’t need everything that it does. The truth is that I’m better with markdown than I am with HTML and CSS these days. So, why not make a static website using markdown? Enter Hugo!
